name: Tf rid (2015)
description:
Tf rid… what can I say? I don’t care if it ain’t peak, it’s peak to me…

Story starts how you want it to.

Available Autobot Characters: Bumblebee, Strongarm, Sideswipe, Drift, Fixit, Grimlock

Available Decepticon Characters: Steeljaw, Thunderhoof, Clampdown, Underbite, Fracture
creator: Fred Quirkley
